case_title: ANDREW RIVAS VS. CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE DENIED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $81.97 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANDREW RIVAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVAS, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC. $1,654.39 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,719.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,654.89 FILED BY RIVAS, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-05-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF RIVAS, ANDREW

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON JUL-11-2017 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF ANDREW RIVAS APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC. AT THE CALLING OF CALENDAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
